description:
A collection of modular and reusable compiler and toolchain technologies.


- LLVM: LLVM 21.1.0 Release Notes — LLVM 21.1.0 documentation
- Clang: Clang 21.1.0 Release Notes — Clang 21.1.0 documentation
- LLD: lld 21.1.0 Release Notes — lld 21.1.0 documentation
- clang-extra: Extra Clang Tools 21.1.0 Release Notes — Extra Clang Tools 21.1.0 documentation
- libc++: Libc++ 21.1.0 Release Notes — libc++ documentation
